response.global_summary: The video begins with a 3D musical performance of IRyS's song "BE MY FLAME", followed by a segment featuring IRyS talking about her recent merchandise, her new album "DANGERUS", and her first solo concert.

scenes.description: IRyS performs her song 'BE MY FLAME' with a 3D stage and background graphics.

scenes.description: IRyS talks to the audience about new merchandise, her album 'DANGERUS', and announces her first solo concert.
